user.title: GL-S200 TDB Boards
user.description: Connect to the s200-bridge WebSocket relay daemon.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to bridge. Is s200-bridge running?

add_device.title: Add TDB Device
add_device.description: Select a device discovered by the bridge. Configure the webhook ID to match what you set in the S200 web UI (GL Dev Board → Automations → Webhook URL).

remove_device.title: Remove TDB Device
remove_device.description: Select a device to remove. Its entities will be removed on next reload.

error.no_devices: No devices discovered from bridge. Is it running and connected to the S200?
error.no_new_devices: All discovered devices have already been added.

abort.no_devices: No devices discovered from bridge. Is it running and connected to the S200?
abort.no_new_devices: All discovered devices have already been added.
